wildcards.text: ...but everyone is secretly a robot
...but it's all a dream inside a dream
...but the hero has been dead since the first scene
...but it's actually a cooking show
...but gravity works in reverse
...but set on a single train journey that never ends
...but the villain and hero are the same person
...but all dialogue must be in song
...but it's a sequel nobody asked for
...but the climax happens in a government office
Someone must say: 'Mogambo khush hua'
Someone must say: 'Kitne aadmi the?'
Someone must say: 'Mere paas maa hai'
Someone must say: 'Rishte mein toh hum tumhare baap lagte hain'
Someone must say: 'Don ko pakadna mushkil hi nahin, namumkin hai'
Someone must say: 'Picture abhi baaki hai mere dost'
Someone must say: 'Pushpa, I hate tears'
Someone must say: 'Bade bade deshon mein'
Someone must say: 'Yeh toh hona hi tha'
Someone must say: 'Main aur meri tanhaai'
...set entirely in 1970s Bombay
...set in the Partition era (1947)
...set during the Emergency (1975-77)
...set in futuristic Mumbai 2099
...set in medieval Rajputana
...set during the 1983 Cricket World Cup
...set in the disco era 1980s
...set during the Kargil War 1999
...set in colonial Calcutta 1920s
...set in 1990s maximum city Mumbai
...also starring Govinda as the sidekick
...also starring Pankaj Tripathi as the villain
...also starring Rekha in a mysterious cameo
...also starring three goats as supporting cast
...also starring Mithun Chakraborty as a disco dancer
...also starring Sunny Deol's hand as a separate character
...also starring an item number by the hero's mother
...also starring a talking parrot who knows the ending
...also starring the Prime Minister in a special appearance
...also starring the ghosts of every character who died in Sholay
